name: WAI-ARIA APG: Treegrid Pattern
notes: Defines treegrid as a hierarchical data grid with expandable and collapsible parent rows, focusable rows and cells, focus versus selection distinction, row-first and cell-first keyboard navigation, expansion with Right and Left Arrow or Enter, selection shortcuts, row and cell roles, aria-expanded placement, aria-selected, aria-sort, aria-readonly, row and column counts, and row or column indices.
